description: Application chrome: root layout with Inter and DM Serif Display fonts, ThemeProvider, and Toaster. Responsive navigation with desktop sidebar (lg:1024px+) and mobile bottom nav with floating Add button. Header with back navigation and theme toggle. Responsive add behavior via useResponsiveAdd hook.

subDeliverables.title: Root layout with fonts, ThemeProvider, Toaster
subDeliverables.description: Root layout.tsx loading Inter and DM Serif Display from Google Fonts, wrapping children in ThemeProvider for dark mode and Toaster for notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Inter loaded as sans-serif body font
DM Serif Display loaded as serif heading font
ThemeProvider wraps the app with system theme detection
Toaster renders toast notifications globally

subDeliverables.title: App layout with sidebar and mobile nav
subDeliverables.description: App-level layout that renders the desktop Sidebar and MobileNav components alongside the main content area with appropriate responsive padding.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar visible on lg: breakpoint and above
MobileNav visible below lg: breakpoint
Main content area has responsive padding (p-4 md:p-6)

subDeliverables.title: Header component with back button and theme toggle
subDeliverables.description: Reusable header component showing page title, optional back button for navigation, and theme toggle button for light/dark mode switching.
acceptanceCriteria: Back button navigates to previous page or specified route
Theme toggle switches between light and dark mode
Page title displayed prominently

subDeliverables.title: Sidebar navigation (desktop)
subDeliverables.description: Desktop sidebar with 16rem width showing navigation links: Home, Statistics, Balance Sheet, Subscriptions, Income Sources, Cards, Settings. Conditionally shows Deposits and Design Kit for authorized users.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar renders at lg: breakpoint with 16rem width
All main navigation links present and functional
Deposits link shown only for juanes/ivonne
Design Kit link shown only for admin users
Active route highlighted

subDeliverables.title: Mobile bottom nav with floating Add button
subDeliverables.description: Bottom navigation bar for mobile with 5 items: Home, Balance, Add (floating), Statistics, More. Add button elevated with -mt-7 and accent amber styling.
acceptanceCriteria: 5 nav items rendered in bottom bar
Add button visually elevated above nav bar
Active item uses scale-110 animation
Hidden at lg: breakpoint when sidebar takes over

subDeliverables.title: Responsive add behavior (useResponsiveAdd + AddSlideOver)
subDeliverables.description: Hook that detects viewport width: on desktop (lg:+) opens AddSlideOver sheet component, on mobile navigates to /add full page.
acceptanceCriteria: Desktop: clicking Add opens Sheet-based slide-over
Mobile: clicking Add navigates to /add page
useResponsiveAdd hook correctly detects breakpoint

subDeliverables.title: Dark mode support via next-themes
subDeliverables.description: Full dark mode implementation using next-themes with system preference detection. All CSS custom properties have dark mode variants defined in globals.css.
acceptanceCriteria: Dark mode toggleable via theme toggle in header
System preference detected on first visit
All color tokens have dark mode variants
No flash of unstyled content on page load
